title: [MTR4] Thadanorka Cargo Pack
description: Cargo Pack for Freight Trains all Across Thadanorka
body:
The Thadanorka Cargo Pack is a Pack that adds Freight to any Existing Thadanorka Train Pack. Adding Freight Cars and 3 New Private Freight Companies.

# Also Try:

[PäRail - Mūñkskaki](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dragon_railway)

[Səlmārã KrānMãphkət - Səlmārã](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/skm-pack)

[Rodani Čräntiži - Rodanï](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rc-pack)

[Ra'avwk Rachw Gu'dwk - Ra'av](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rrg-pack)

# What this Adds

Freight Cars (No longer part of PäRail Trains Addon)

Thadanorka Freight: D444 and A140 Locomotives

Central Freight: L80 and L50 Locomotives

TransDimažk Cargo: 5300 Locomotive

# Of Note

This Pack is not Compatable with PäRail Trains Addon Version 2.4.1 and Below! Please update to 2.5 or Later.
